executives.name: Amanda Chow
executives.background: Amanda Chow is a CPA, CMA with over 20 years of experience in the resource sector, focusing on financial reporting and compliance.

executives.name: Jim Pettit
executives.background: Jim Pettit is the Chairman of the Board and has over 30 years of experience in the resource industry specializing in finance, corporate governance, and management. He has served as a director and officer for several public companies.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
